title: AWS Cloud Developer
description: Diverse Lynx is looking for AWS Cloud Developer to join our dynamic team and embark on a rewarding career journey We are seeking a skilled AWS Cloud Developer to join our dynamic IT team The ideal candidate will have a strong background in software development and a deep understanding of AWS cloud services The AWS Cloud Developer will be responsible for designing, developing, and deploying scalable cloud-based solutions, as well as ensuring the security and performance of cloud applications Responsibilities:Cloud Application Development:Design, develop, and deploy scalable and reliable cloud-based applications on AWS Write efficient, reusable, and maintainable code using programming languages such as Python, Java, or Node.js Infrastructure as Code (IaC):Implement Infrastructure as Code using tools such as AWS CloudFormation or Terraform to automate infrastructure provisioning and management Microservices Architecture:Work with microservices architecture, containerization (Docker), and orchestration tools (e g, Kubernetes) to build and deploy modular applications Database Management:Set up and manage databases on AWS, utilizing services like Amazon RDS, DynamoDB, or others Security and Compliance:Implement and maintain security best practices in cloud applications Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations related to data protection and privacy Monitoring and Optimization:Implement monitoring and logging solutions to track application performance and troubleshoot issues Optimize cloud infrastructure and applications for cost efficiency and performance Collaboration:Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including software engineers, system administrators, and security teams, to deliver high-quality solutions Documentation:Create and maintain comprehensive documentation for cloud architectures, configurations, and processes

title: Oracle Analytics Cloud (OAC) Developer
description: We are looking for a talented Oracle Analytics Cloud (OAC) Developer with at least 5 years of experience to design, develop, and implement robust analytics solutions. The ideal candidate will be skilled in creating dynamic dashboards, reports, and data visualizations using OAC while collaborating with stakeholders to deliver actionable insights. Key Responsibilities Dashboard and Report Development: Design and develop interactive dashboards, KPIs, and reports using Oracle Analytics Cloud. Translate business requirements into effective and visually appealing data visualizations. Data Modeling: Build and maintain data models, semantic layers, and subject areas within OAC. Optimize data structures and queries to enhance report performance. Data Integration: Integrate OAC with various data sources, such as Oracle Autonomous Data Warehouse (ADW), Oracle EBS, and external systems. Develop and implement data pipelines to transform and load data into OAC. Performance Optimization: Monitor and tune OAC processes, ensuring optimal performance of dashboards and reports. Resolve performance bottlenecks in queries, visualizations, or data workflows. Collaboration: Work with business analysts and stakeholders to understand reporting requirements and deliver data-driven solutions. Documentation: Document technical designs, data flows, and best practices for OAC development and usage. Required Skills and Qualifications Technical Expertise: 5 years of experience in developing with Oracle Analytics Cloud (OAC). Proficiency in creating dashboards, reports, and data visualizations. Strong SQL skills for data querying and transformation. Experience in data modeling, semantic layer design, and subject area creation. Familiarity with integrating OAC with Oracle and non-Oracle data sources. Tools & Technologies: Experience with Oracle Autonomous Data Warehouse (ADW), Oracle Database, or other data platforms. Knowledge of APIs and REST integrations within OAC. Problem Solving: Strong analytical skills to troubleshoot and resolve issues in OAC solutions. Preferred Qualifications Knowledge of Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) and related services. Exposure to advanced analytics features or machine learning capabilities within OAC. Oracle certifications in OAC or related technologies are a plus. Education Bachelor s degree in Computer Science, Data Analytics, Information Technology, or a related field. Collaborate with senior developers to design and implement software solutions that meet business requirements. Engage in all stages of the software development lifecycle, including planning, analysis, design, implementation, testing, deployment, and maintenance. Handle incoming bug tickets, provides timely updates and assists with QA for bug fixes Work closely with Product Managers, Designers, QA Engineers, and DevOps to understand project goals, clarify technical requirements, and ensure smooth deployment and operations of applications. Participate in peer code reviews to maintain high code quality and consistency across the team. Learn from feedback and also provide constructive input to others. Continuously explore new tools, frameworks, and programming techniques. Take initiative to learn and apply modern development practices and technologies relevant to the tech stack. Requirements Must-Have: Bachelor s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. 6m of experience in software development - as an intern or in a full time role Proficiency in Java programming language Understanding of OOP concepts, data structures, and algorithms. Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git). Nice-to-Have: Exposure to Python programming language Exposure to cloud platforms like AWS, GCP, or Azure. Experience with databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or MongoDB. Basic familiarity with Docker or K8s
about_company: DrinkPrime was started to solve a personal problem - How do we get access to clean, safe, and healthy drinking waterSeems simple, but heres what we found. First, most of the water you get in plastic cans isnt fit for drinking. Second, less than 5 of Indians actually own a water purifier Thats when we realised this wasnt just a personal problem but an opportunity to help a lot of people.

title: Generalist Software Engineer
description: About the Role: We are seeking a Generalist Software Engineer with experiences in full stack (MongoDB, React/Angular, Node.js) and strong experience in Data, AI, Cloud, and DevOps. As a critical resource across multiple engagements, you will work on diverse projects involving full-stack development, AI-driven applications, scalable cloud solutions, and DevOps automation. You should be highly adaptable, eager to learn, and capable of delivering high-quality, efficient, and scalable solutions across multiple domains.
